case_title: GAGLIARDI, RICHARD et al VS KILBRETH, JEFFREY L. et al

docket_entries.description: SECOND CHECK RECEIVED FROM PLAINTIFF FOR SHERIFF'S SERVICE FEE. TRIAL DATE CHANGED TO FEB. 06, 2007 TO MEET 45 DAY MINIMUM REQ.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT KILBRETH, JEFFREY L. EIRWEISS, GAIL B. DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES AFTER PENDING SETTLEMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KILBRETH, JEFFREY L.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GAGLIARDI, RICHARD GAGLIARDI, KRISTINE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT KILBRETH, JEFFREY L. EIRWEISS, GAIL B. DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES AFTER PENDING SETTLEMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY GAGLIARDI, RICHARD GAGLIARDI, KRISTINE AS TO DEFENDANT KILBRETH, JEFFREY L. EIRWEISS, GAIL B. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-06-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-06-2007, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-19-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUED TO 3/19/07 AT 1:30 P.M. SETTLEMENT PENDING. IF NO APPEARANCES, DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE
